meaning: 瓦胡岛[美国](在太平洋中北部,夏威夷群岛的主岛)
examples: The biggest priority is laying undersea cables between the outer islands and Oahu.
Vacationing on the island of Oahu, we were waiting in our tour bus for some stragglers to show up.
Waves of up to two meters hit the Hawaiian chain of islands, swamping the beach at the Waikiki resort on the island of Oahu.
During the rest of the year, Oahu enjoys the most notorious surf in the world.
Start on the capital island of Oahu, basing yourself in Waikiki or Kailua for a week.
